flavourText: A magical mirror that only lets you pass if you can describe yourself perfectly in French. Show it who you really are!
The strictest headteacher in France is testing your knowledge of school life. Impress him and earn your place at the top of the class!
This leisure-loving boss has tried every hobby under the sun. Can you match their passion for free time in perfect French?
A fearless French traveller who has been everywhere. Beat them by describing the ultimate holiday - past, present and future!
Your fictional French aunt who asks endless questions about the family at every gathering. Answer them all to survive the reunion!
A friendly ghost lost in a French town. Guide them to safety using your directions and local knowledge!
The voice of the people demands answers! Show your understanding of social issues and prove you can make a difference.
The guardian of planet Earth needs your help. Use your French to explain how we can save the environment!
A rogue AI that only speaks French! Defeat it by proving you understand the digital world better than it does.
The fortune teller of futures! She challenges you to describe your plans and ambitions in flawless French.
This fearsome grammar dragon guards the gates of fluency. Only perfect tenses, agreements and structures will defeat it!
The bilingual sphinx speaks in riddles between English and French. Translate your way to victory!
